title: White & Gold Christmas Stag Tissue Paper – Pack of 10 Gift Wrapping Sheets with Self-Adhesive Tabs, 50cm
features: Elegant Stag Design – Add a festive touch to your gift wrapping with these stylish white and gold Christmas stag tissue sheets.
Pack of 10 Sheets – Includes 5 printed stag tissues and 5 plain coordinating sheets, perfect for wrapping, stuffing and decorating gifts.
Includes 10 Seal Tabs – Comes with self-adhesive tabs for securing tissue neatly inside bags, boxes or hampers.
Generous 50cm Size – Each sheet measures approx. 50cm x 50cm, ideal for gift bags, presents, hampers, crafts and seasonal displays.
Soft & High-Quality Paper – Made from premium paper, easy to fold, shape and layer for a polished festive presentation.
description: Sold: Pack of 10 Approx size: 50cm x 50cm / 20 in x 20 in Material: Paper Pack contains 5 printed and 5 plain colour tissues. Includes 10 self adhesive seal tabs.
